_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active metadata principles, automated lineage tracking, and business glossary governance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-011 (AI, cosine: 0.433), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.431).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.0/10 (raw 0.196). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, lexicon, terminology] vs WIDAI-only terms [active, automated, business, catalog, data, glossary] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.897, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.7%). "Knowledge of cyber lexicon/terminology" and "Knowledge of data catalog and metadata management platforms, including active me" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.438 > STS 0.196 (gap +0.242). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [cyber, lexicon, terminology]. WIDAI-only: [active, automated, business, catalog, data, glossary].
